case_title: MARCUS CAMPOS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF MARCUS CAMPOS IS PRESENT.
